title: Erudium
description: A Mod that cool weapons, custom mobs and overpowered food that is nothing short of strange
body:
# Erudium Mod – Project Description

## What the project does or adds:
Erudium is a custom Minecraft mod designed for private servers. It adds a variety of unique items, blocks, and gameplay features to enhance building, exploration, and fun with friends, including:

**Smoked Sand** – A food for some reason?

**Pokerfish Extract & Pokerfish Sand** – things for smoked sand and also fuel

**Honza & Vojta** – Custom NPCs or entities for added personality

**Compressor** – a utility block for crafting or resource processing

**Coffee Stuff** – items and mechanics related to coffee

**Villager Profession** – a new job type for villagers to interact with

**JEI Compatibility** – ensures all new items and recipes are visible in the Just Enough Items interface

## When should you download it:
When you feel like theres not enough chaos in your modpack

## Other critical information:

Designed primarily for private or small-group servers.

Focused on fun and customization rather than complex systems.

![Stuff from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68646d23697240b72a4a0a354af8d8c2708fab81.png)
